title: Array Technologies Q1 2026 Financial Results and Record Orderbook
text:
ARRAY Technologies Q1 2026 Financial Results

Orderbook Achievement:
ARRAY achieved a record orderbook of $2.4 billion as of March 31, 2026. The company maintained strong momentum with a 2x book-to-bill ratio and noted approximately 50% growth in their APA division's orderbook.

Q1 2026 Financial Performance:

Revenue & Margins:
- Quarterly revenue reached $223.4 million
- Gross margin stood at 28.2%
- Adjusted gross margin improved to 30.7%

Profitability Metrics:
- Adjusted EBITDA: $28.8 million
- GAAP net loss to common shareholders: ($13.5 million)
- Adjusted net income per share: $0.06

Full-Year 2026 Guidance:
The company reaffirmed its 2026 outlook, expecting:
- Revenue between $1.4–$1.5 billion
- Adjusted EBITDA of $200–$230 million
- Adjusted earnings per share of $0.65–$0.75
- Q2 2026 revenue guidance: $300–$320 million

Notable Developments:
ARRAY introduced DuraTrack D2S, described as a new dual-row tracker solution for international markets featuring passive wind stow technology and terrain adaptability capabilities.
